title: Move All Zeros to the End Fullstack
description:
### Objective
Create a full-stack application to solve the classic algorithm: **Move All Zeros to the End**.

### Problem Description
Write a program to move all the zero characters in a given string to the end while maintaining the order of non-zero characters.

### Example
```text
Input: "a0b0c1"
Output: "abc100"
```

### File Overview
* **`src/App.tsx`**: The React component for user input.
* **`backend/src/moveallzerostotheend/moveallzerostotheend.service.ts`**: The NestJS service containing the algorithm.
* **`backend/src/moveallzerostotheend/moveallzerostotheend.controller.ts`**: The controller defining the route.
userPrompt: Generate a Full Stack React + NestJS coding challenge for the DSA problem "Move All Zeros to the End".

visibleTests.description: Verify that the backend endpoint processes the standard input correctly and returns a successful response.
Check if the frontend React component renders successfully and the Axios submission triggers properly.

title: Conditional Reverse Based on Length Fullstack
description:
### Objective
Create a full-stack application to solve the classic algorithm: **Conditional Reverse Based on Length**.

### Problem Description
Write a program to check the length of a given string.  
If the length is even, reverse the string.  
If the length is odd, print * for each character.

### Example
```text
Input: "abcd"
Output: "dcba"
Input: "abc"
Output: "***"
```

### File Overview
* **`src/App.tsx`**: The React component for user input.
* **`backend/src/conditionalreversebasedonlength/conditionalreversebasedonlength.service.ts`**: The NestJS service containing the algorithm.
* **`backend/src/conditionalreversebasedonlength/conditionalreversebasedonlength.controller.ts`**: The controller defining the route.
userPrompt: Generate a Full Stack React + NestJS coding challenge for the DSA problem "Conditional Reverse Based on Length".

visibleTests.description: Verify that the backend endpoint processes the standard input correctly and returns a successful response.
Check if the frontend React component renders successfully and the Axios submission triggers properly.
